hero.title: Life skills that really stick.
hero.description: Short 2–3 minute lessons + quiz + scenario. We develop financial literacy, cybersecurity, legal basics and communication — in a convenient mobile format.

catalog.title: Popular courses
catalog.subtitle: We show real courses:
catalog.noCoursesHint: Add courses in the admin panel — and they will appear on the landing automatically.
catalog.defaultDescription: Short lessons + quiz + scenarios to practice skills.

howItWorks.title: Watch. Check. Apply.
howItWorks.description: We made a simple learning cycle: micro-lesson → quiz → scenario. It helps turn knowledge into action and maintain regularity.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Short and to the point — no overload.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We reinforce understanding immediately after viewing.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Choose an option and see the consequences.
howItWorks.psychNote: The psychological module is an early "signal" for attention, not a medical diagnosis.

features.financeDesc: Budget, value of money, daily decisions.
features.lawDesc: Clear basics for online and offline.
features.recommendationsDesc: Tips for the next learning step.

audience.title: One platform — different roles
audience.studentsDesc: Short lessons + practice to really remember.
audience.teachersDesc: Overview of progress and results without manual spreadsheets.
audience.parentsDesc: Understanding that your child is learning useful skills.

teacherAnalytics.title: For teachers — clear analytics
teacherAnalytics.description: Who studies regularly, who skips, which topics cause difficulty — all in one place.
teacherAnalytics.riskSignalsDesc: Help notice a problem before it becomes big.

cta.title: Try for free and show results.
cta.description: For diploma demonstration, first impression is important — this screen makes it strong.

footer.description: Practical micro-learning for life skills — with teacher panel.

auth.welcomeDescription: 2–3 minute lessons, quizzes and situational tasks for students (6–16) — with progress tracking for teachers.
auth.startQuickly: Start in a couple of minutes
auth.startQuicklyDesc: Login to open your personal account and continue learning.

registerType.chooseRole: Choose a role to create an account and access the required cabinet.
registerType.chooseRoleHint: Choose a role to create an account

teacher.title: Teacher panel
teacher.loginRequired: You need to login through the general login page first.
teacher.loginDescription: Use the login on the `/auth` page — after authorization, the site will automatically redirect the teacher here.
teacher.goToLoginDesc: Open the general login and registration page.

teacherRegister.description: Teacher registration gives access to monitoring progress, test results and risk zones for students.
teacherRegister.hintText: Specify "homeroom teacher" (e.g. 7A) so students can register in your class.

teacherProfile.needLoginDesc: After login you will be able to see your teacher profile.
teacherProfile.noStudentsHint: Students will appear here after they register for your class.

teacherRisk.noStudentsHint: No students are attached to your account yet.
teacherRisk.noResultsHint: No students match the selected test and risk criteria.
teacherRisk.noAttemptHint: Select a student on the left to view results by categories and answers.

teacherAutoTests.noCompletedTestsHint: Your students haven't completed psychological tests yet.

teacherStudentTests.noResultsHint: This student hasn't completed psychological tests yet.
teacherStudentTests.noAttemptsHint: No completed attempts found for this test.
teacherStudentTests.selectAttemptHint: Select an attempt on the left to view zones by categories.
teacherStudentTests.selectTestHint: Select a test on the left to see all attempts, then open one for details.

teacherProgress.noStudentsHint: No students are attached to your account yet.
teacherProgress.selectStudentHint: Select a student on the left to view course progress.
teacherProgress.selectCourseHint: Select a course card above to view scenario results.
teacherProgress.noScenariosForCourse: Situation tests are not yet configured for this course.
teacherProgress.noScenariosForLesson: There are no situation tests in this lesson.

student.needLoginDesc: Use the general authorization page, then you will be redirected here.
student.noLessons: There are no lessons in this course yet.
student.programFullyCompletedBanner: Congratulations! You have completed the entire educational program — all available courses have been successfully completed.
student.noVideoAttached: No video attached to this lesson.
student.scenarioAvailable: A scenario has become available to reinforce the material.
student.scenarioInDev: The scenario loading section is under development. A dialog for selecting answer options will open here.
student.scenariosAvailableCount: You have {{count}} situation test(s) available for this lesson. Each can be passed once.
student.allScenariosCompleted: All situation tests for this lesson have already been completed. You can open the page and view results.
student.selectLessonHint: Select a course and lesson on the left to start learning.
student.testIntroDescription: You will be offered several questions. Please answer honestly. After completing the test, results will be sent to your teacher.
student.forgotAnswer: ⚠️ You forgot to select an answer to this question
student.testCompletedDesc: Your answers have been saved and sent to your teacher for review. Thank you for taking the test.
student.noQuestionsInTest: There are no questions in this test yet.
student.answerAllQuestions: You didn't answer all questions! Please select answers for the questions highlighted in red.
student.confirmFinishTest: Are you sure you want to finish the test? After that, answers cannot be changed.
student.lessonCompletedSuccess: You have successfully completed this lesson.
student.readyForNextLesson: Ready to move to the next lesson?
student.courseCompletedCongrats: Congratulations, you have completed all lessons in this course.
student.goToNextCourseHint: You can immediately move to the next course and continue learning.
student.programCompletedCongrats: Congratulations! You have completed the entire educational program.
student.programCompletedThankYou: You have successfully completed all courses. Thank you for learning!
student.completeOtherCourses: To complete the entire program, complete other courses from the list on the left.
student.completeRemainingLessons: To complete the course, complete the remaining lessons from the list.
student.needSaveProgressLogin: To save progress and take tests, you need to login to your student account.

studentRegister.description: Student registration opens access to lessons, tests and progress tracking.
studentRegister.importantDesc: Select a school and class — so the teacher can see your progress.
studentRegister.noClassesForSchool: No classes found for this school

studentProfile.needLoginDesc: After login you will be able to see your student profile.

notFound.title: Such a page does not exist.
notFound.description: Go to one of the available sections below.

publicCourses.noLessonsInCourse: There are no lessons in this course yet.
publicCourses.noVideo: No video attached to this lesson.
publicCourses.needLoginForProgress: To save progress and take tests, you need to login to your student account.
publicCourses.selectLessonHint: Select a course and lesson on the left to view materials.

situationTest.selectOneTest: Select one of the situation tests for this lesson. Each test can be passed once.
situationTest.testUnavailable: The situation test is currently unavailable.
situationTest.introText: You have completed the lesson "{{lesson}}". You have a situation test available: a short situation and choosing an action. It can be passed once; after submitting the answer, you will not be able to retake the same test.
situationTest.backToList: ← Back to list of situation tests
situationTest.confirmSubmit: Are you sure you want to confirm the selected answer? After submission, you won't be able to change your choice.
situationTest.loginRequired: To take the test, login as a student. Direct links for other users do not provide access to your progress.
situationTest.noScenariosConfigured: The situation test is not configured for this lesson.

admin.noPermission: You don't have permission to view the admin panel.

adminSchools.noTeachers: No teachers in this school yet.
adminSchools.noStudents: No students for this teacher yet.
adminSchools.confirmDeleteSchool: Delete school? Warning: this will also permanently delete all its teachers and students!
adminSchools.confirmDeleteTeacher: Delete teacher and their account? Warning: this will also permanently delete all their students!
adminSchools.classAutoHint: Class is determined automatically from the teacher's class
adminSchools.classNotSpecifiedForTeacher: The selected teacher does not have a homeroom class specified. Enter class manually.

adminCourses.noCoursesYet: No courses yet. Click "Add course" to create the first one.
adminCourses.confirmDeleteCourse: Are you sure you want to delete this course?
adminCourses.noLessonsYet: No lessons yet. Click "Add lesson" to create the first one.
adminCourses.confirmDeleteLesson: Are you sure you want to delete this lesson?
adminCourses.noScenarioYet: This lesson doesn't have an interactive scenario yet
adminCourses.noScenarioHint: Add a scenario so students can read the situation, see a photo and make a decision that affects the outcome.
adminCourses.noOptionsYet: No answer options yet. Add the first one!

adminCourses.confirmDeleteScenario: Delete scenario and all its answer options?

adminTests.noTestsYet: No tests yet. Click "Add test" to create the first one.
adminTests.noCategoriesYet: No categories yet. Click "Add category" to create the first one.
adminTests.bulkAnswerDesc: Specify answer options and their points. They will be added to all selected questions.
adminTests.addAtLeastOneAnswer: Add at least one answer option
